title: Notify with Exceptions
excerpt: Can you add an exception option to notifications? For example, if a piece of content is ready to be reviewed, I want to notify the team, EXCEPT the author who wrote it, since they won’t be peer reviewing. Then for the se…

posts.author: creeves (Caroline Reeves)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you add an exception option to notifications? For example, if a piece of content is ready to be reviewed, I want to notify the team, EXCEPT the author who wrote it, since they won’t be peer reviewing. Then for the second round of peer review, I want to notify the team, EXCEPT the author and reviewer 1.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You ‘could’ but it would pretty manual to set up with workflows. How many users do you have

posts.author: creeves (Caroline Reeves)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s probably too many to do it manually. It’s about 8 users, but with multiple rounds of review.
